description_long: This rifle features a distinctive skeletal design with exposed, bone-like elements along the receiver and stock, giving it a rugged, post-apocalyptic appearance. The main body is constructed from a dark, metallic material with weathered, brownish accents, and the barrel is long and slender, ending in a cylindrical muzzle device. A prominent scope is mounted on top, suggesting the rifle is intended for precision shooting at long range. The magazine is box-shaped and protrudes beneath the receiver, while the grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the lower frame. The overall form is angular and aggressive, with a bipod or support structure visible beneath the barrel. The rifle's finish is matte and slightly rough, with a mix of metallic and synthetic textures.
description: A skeletal, bone-accented rifle with a long barrel, mounted scope, and box magazine, finished in dark metal and brown tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, skeletal stock, mounted scope, and extended barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile, scope alignment, and skeletal structure along the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the box magazine, grip, and detailed skeletal framework along the body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle device, barrel opening, and symmetrical skeletal elements on either side.
